name: biofkit

metadata.name: biofkit
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: With biofkit you can deal with pdb file (extract sequence, atom information and so on) very easily. Pairwise alignment function is now online.

documentation:
# biofkit
Biofkit is now containing only one module with one package which can deal with pdb file (extract sequence, atom information and so on) very easily. 

## How to Install
### Conda
```console
conda install -c chou_uken biofkit
```
### Mamba
``` 
mamba install -c chou_uken biofkit
```

### Pip
```console
pip install biofkit
```

## How to Use
Documents will help you!
[中文文档](https://chou-uken.github.io/biofkit/chinese/)
Waiting for more languages...

modules.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein
documentation:
This script was created on Jan 3rd, 2024 by Zhang Yujian as a doctoral candidate in Institute of Zoology, CAS.
Thanks for using. Please report bugs (if any) at zhangyujian23@mails.ucas.ac.cn.
Sorry for my poor English.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.pdb2List
documentation:
Read a PDB file into a list.

Args:
    pdbFilePath (str): PDB file path.
    csvPath (str): If you want to output a csv file, this argument is needed.
    colName (str): True for pdbInfoColumns exist in this list, false otherwise.

Returns:
    list: Protein structure in form of list.
load the information of all amino-acid-residue atoms into a list. output[idx] shows the information of an atom.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.pdb2Dict
documentation:
Read a PDB file and transfer it into a dictionary.

Args:
    pdbFilePath (str): PDB file path.

Returns:
    dict: Protein structure information in form of dictionary.
load the information of all amimo-acid-residue atoms into a dictionary, which can be converted into a dataframe with famous `pandas`.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.proDict2ProList
documentation:
Transfer a protein structure information with dictionary form into a list. It has been decrepit.

Args:
    rawDict (dict): Protein structure information with form of dictionary.

Returns:
    list: Protein structure information with form of list.
This funtion 'proDict2ProList' is used to tranfer pdbDict into pdbList.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.proList2ProDict
documentation:
Transfer protein structure in form of list into a dictionary.

Args:
    rawList (list): Protein structure information in form of list.

Returns:
    dict: Protein structure information in form of dictionary.
This function 'proList2ProDIct' is used to tranfer pdbList into pdbDict.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.proListIsValid
documentation:
Define protein structure in form of list is valid or not.

Args:
    proList (list): Protein structure information in form of list.

Returns:
    bool: True for valid, false otherwise.

Raises:
    IndexError: Not every sublist has a length of 8.
    TypeError: Atom properties (elements) have wrong type.
Define proList is valid or not?

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.proDictIsValid
documentation:
Define protein structure information in form of dictionary is valid or not.

Args:
    proDict (dict): Protein structure in form of dictionary.

Returns:
    bool: True for proDict is valid, false otherwise.

Raises:
    IndexError: Not each sublist has a length of 8.
    TypeError: Not each atom property (elements) has proper type.
Define proDict is valid or not?

classes.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.OldProtein

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.oldProtein.OldProtein.__init__
documentation:
Inits oldProtein with pdbFile, infoDict, infoList, chainId. Not all of them are necessary.
Args:
    pdbFile (str): The path of your PDB file.
    infoDict (dict): Organized dictionary of protein structure information.
    infoList (list): Organized list of protein structure information.
    chainId (list): Read listed chains and ignore the others.

A protein class which has been decrepit.

This old class organize protein structures in form of list or dictionary.
This class can contain several chains.

Attributes:
    name (str): Protein name.
    infoList (list): Protein structure information in form of list.
    infoDict (dict): Protein structure information in form of dictionary.
This new type 'protein' is for operation pdb file.

classes.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Atom

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Atom.__init__
documentation:
Inits Atom with its id, type and coordinate.

Args:
    serial (int): Id of atom.
    atom (str): Type of atom.
    x (float): Coordinate of x.
    y (float): Coordinate of y.
    z (float): Coordinate of z.
    occupancy (float): Occupancy of atom.
    tempFactor (float): Temperature factor of atom.
    element (str): Element symbol.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Atom.getCoord
documentation:
Get coordinate of some atom.

Returns:
    dict[str, float]: x/y/z axis and its coordinate.

A class containing number, type and coordinate of an atom.

Attributes:
    serial (int): Id of atom.
    atom (str): Type of atom.
    x (float): Coordinate of x.
    y (float): Coordinate of y.
    z (float): Coordinate of z.
    occupancy (float): Occupancy of atom.
    tempFactor (float): Temperature factor of atom.
    element (str): Element symbol.

documentation:
Inits residue with its id, type and atoms.

Args:
    resSeq (int): Id of residue.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Residue.getName
documentation:
To get type of this residue.

Returns:
    str: Type of this residue.

A class containing number, type and its Atoms of a residue in a peptide.

Attributes:
    resSeq (int): Id of residue.
    resName (str): Type of residue.
    atomSet (list[Atom]): Set of Atom belonging to this residue.

classes.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Peptide

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Peptide.__init__
documentation:
Inits Peptide with its id and residues belonging to it.

Args:
    chainId (str): Id of this chain.
    resSet (list[Residue]): Set of Residues belonging to this chain.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Peptide.getChainId
documentation:
To get id of this chain.

Returns:
    str: Id of this chain.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Peptide.cut
documentation:
To cut a peptide at specific site.

Args:
    end (int): Id of the residue at the end of output.
    beginning (int): Id of the residue at the beginning of output.
    newChainId (str): Id of the Peptide you created.

Returns:
    Peptide: A new peptide.

a class of peptide with its id and set of residues belonging to it.

Attributes:
    chainId (str): Id of this chain.
    resSet (list[Residue]): Set of Residues belonging to this chain.

classes.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Protein

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Protein.__init__
documentation:
Inits Protein with its Peptides and its name.

Args:
    pepList (list[Peptide]): a list comprising of Peptides.
    name (str): Name of this protein.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Protein.pick
documentation:
Pick specific peptides from a Protein then create a list of Peptide.

Args:
    chainId (list[str]): Id of selected peptides.

Returns:
    list[Peptide]: A list of Peptides with given Id.

methods.name: biofkit.proteinKit.proteinClass.Protein.select
documentation:
Select specific peptides from a Protein then create a new Protein.

Args:
    chainId (list[str]): Id of selected peptides.

Returns:
    Protein: New name is Protein_[ChainId].

a class containing protein with its peptides.

Attributes:
    name (str): Name of this protein.
    pepSet (list[Peptide]): The list of Peptides belonging to the Protein.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.pdbKit.pdb2Seq
documentation:
Extract sequence information from a PDB file.

Args:
    pdbFilePath (str): Path of PDB file.
    fastaFilePath (str): FASTA file file output. None for nothing to create.
    fastaLineLen (int): How many residue letter each line.

Returns:
    dict[str, str]: Key is chainId. Value is sequence.
transfer protein structure file (pdb) into sequence string.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.pdbKit.readPDB
documentation:
Load PDB file to get a Protein.
Args:
    pdbFile (str): PDB file path.

Returns:
    Protein: Class Protein in proteinClass.py
load PDB file

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.pdbKit.assemble
documentation:
merge peptides.

Args:
    newProtein (list[Peptide]): List of merged peptides.
    name (str): Name of new protein.

Returns:
    Protein.
Merge Peptides to generate a Protein.

functions.name: biofkit.proteinKit.pdbKit.writePDB
documentation:
Write PDB file

Args:
    protein (Protein): The Protein you want to save as PDB file.
    filePath (str): Output path.
    printInfo (bool): Whether printing writing output or not.
Write Protein into a PDB file.

modules.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit
documentation:
This script was created by Zhang Yujian on January 22nd, 2024.
This script is aimed to convert different sequence infomation involved in bioinformation.

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.readFasta
documentation:
To read FASTA file and get its identifiers and sequences. The output is a ordered dictionary whose keys are identifiers, values are sequences

Args:
    fastaFilePath (str): Path of FASTA file.

Returns:
    OrderedDict[str, str]: Keys are identifiers. And values are sequences.
Read fasta files

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.dna2Rna
documentation:
To transcribe DNA into RNA.

Args:
    dnaSeq (str): DNA sequence. Capitalization does not matter.

Returns:
    str: RNA sequence. All letters are uppercase.
transcription

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.rna2Dna
documentation:
To reverse transcribe RNA sequence into DNA sequence.

Args:
    rnaSeq (str): RNA sequence. Capitalization does not matter.

Returns:
    str: DNA sequence. All letters are uppercase.
reverse transcription

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.dna2Pro
documentation:
To translate DNA sequence into protein sequence directly.

Args:
    dnaSeq (str): DNA sequence. Capitalization does not matter.
    start (int): Beginning site of the translation.
    end (int): Ending site of the translation.

Returns:
    str: Protein sequence. All letters are uppercase.
DNA translation

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.rna2Pro
documentation:
To translate RNA sequence into protein sequence.

Args:
    rnaSeq (str): RNA sequence. Capitalization does not matter.
    start (int): Beginning site of the translation.
    end (int): Ending site of the translation.

Returns:
    str: Protein sequence. All letters are uppercase.
RNA translation

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.pairwiseDnaAlign
documentation:
Pairwise DNA Alignment. Results will be output in console.

Args:
    fasta (str): FASTA file with two sequences.
    seqA (str): If no FASTA file is given. Sequence can be put into argument seqA.
    seqB (str): If no FASTA file is given. Sequence can be put into argument seqB.
    matrix (str): score matrix. Can be 'unitary', 'blast' or 'tt'.
    gapOpen (float): Punishment for opening a gap.
    gapExtend (float): Punishment for extending a gap.
Alignment

functions.name: biofkit.seqKit.convKit.pairwiseProtAlign
documentation:
Pairwise Protein Alignment. Results will be output in console.

Args:
    fasta (str): FASTA file with two sequences.
    seqA (str): If no FASTA file is given. Sequence can be put into argument seqA.
    seqB (str): If no FASTA file is given. Sequence can be put into argument seqB.
    matrix (str): score matrix. Can be 'unitary', 'blosum62' or 'pam250'.
    gapOpen (float): Punishment for opening a gap.
    gapExtend (float): Punishment for extending a gap.
    consoleWidth (int): This determine how many bases shown in a single line.
